result: If I could change the world in one way, I would ensure that every person has universal access to high-quality education and critical-thinking training. When people are equipped with the skills to understand complex issues, evaluate evidence, and empathize with others’ perspectives, they’re better prepared to solve problems collaboratively and resist manipulation. An empowered, informed population could drive progress on countless fronts—health, environment, justice—because people would make decisions based on knowledge, compassion, and a shared sense of responsibility.

prompt: If you could change the world in one way, what would it be?
